html:
Exclusive to:

The Hardwood Hat is a Character-specific wearable Armor Item for the head slot craftable by Woodie in Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted in Woodie's Survivor Filter after unlocking Hat Carving in his Skill Tree. It requires 6 Logs, 1 Pine Cone, and Lucy the Axe to craft, with Lucy not being consumed in the process.

The Hardwood Hat can be equipped by any character and absorbs 70% of incoming physical damage. Additionally, it negates damage caused by falling items from Earthquakes in the Caves. It can also be added to a Campfire or Fire Pit for fuel, even when its durability is nearly gone.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Swamp Collection
Dampwood Hat
Somehow, it works. You'll be stumped.

Tips

  • The Hardwood Hat is a cheap item Woodie can craft in the very early game and give to any character, which may be helpful before players find materials for better Armor.
  • This item may be useful even in the late game as players can equip followers such as Bunnymen or Wurt's Loyal Merm Guards with Armor at a low cost.

Trivia

  • The Hardwood Hat was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.

Miscellaneous
"woodcarvedhat"
“It looks like it's been lovingly carved.”
–Wilson
“Oooh, what a flammable- I mean, fancy hat!”
–Willow
“Is thick and sturdy, like Wolfgang's own mighty skull!”
–Wolfgang
“Today, a pine hat... Perhaps tomorrow a pine box.”
–Wendy
“HE DIDN'T CARVE IT WITH HIS TEETH. THIS IS PROGRESS”
–WX-78
“A bit utilitarian, but sturdy enough.”
–Wickerbottom
“What a beaut! Lucy outdid herself!”
–Woodie
“Too rugged for my tastes.”
–Maxwell
“A helm öf the förest.”
–Wigfrid
“A cozy hollow for our head.”
–Webber
“Ah, I can see it's been carved with love and care.”
–Warly
“Strong friend hat”
–Wormwood
“Gotta keep the old noggin' safe on the work site.”
–Winona
“Perhaps I can borrow it, if I axe nicely.”
–Wortox
“Wood choppy man make it with metal choppy friend!”
–Wurt
“Mr. Woodie said he and Ms. Lucy would teach me how to whittle!”
–Walter
“How rugged!”
–Wanda
The Hardwood Hat is a Character-specific wearable Armor Item for the head slot craftable by Woodie in Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted in Woodie's Survivor Filter after unlocking Hat Carving in his Skill Tree. It requires 6 Logs, 1 Pine Cone, and Lucy the Axe to craft, with Lucy not being consumed in the process.
The Hardwood Hat can be equipped by any character and absorbs 70% of incoming physical damage. Additionally, it negates damage caused by falling items from Earthquakes in the Caves. It can also be added to a Campfire or Fire Pit for fuel, even when its durability is nearly gone.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Gỗ Cứng là một Vật phẩm Giáp có thể đeo dành riêng cho Nhân vật dành cho khe đầu được chế tạo bởi Woodie trong Don't Starve Together. Nó chỉ có thể được chế tạo trong Bộ lọc sống sót của Woodie sau khi mở khóa Khắc mũ trong Cây kỹ năng của anh ấy. Nó cần 6 Gỗ, 1 Quả Thông và Rìu Lucy để chế tạo, Lucy không bị tiêu hao trong quá trình chế tạo.

The Hardwood Hat can be equipped by any character and absorbs 70% of incoming physical damage. Additionally, it negates damage caused by falling items from [[Earthquake]]s in the [[Caves]]. It can also be added to a [[Campfire]] or [[Fire Pit]] for [[fuel]], even when its durability is nearly gone. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Body_Items|Belongings}}
